3110710.name: Federation Mycha
3110710.description:
Civilization is on the brink of destruction as mutated and rampant animals have claimed Earth as their feeding grounds. You and other agents of the Federation are tasked with protecting humanity's future and investigating the source of mutations. Researchers suspect a newer crystal-like material called Mycha is to blame. Explore various environments as you exterminate the threat to civilization and learn more about Mycha.



Gear up and set out on expenditures as a solo agent or group up with your friends via online multiplayer! The threats you'll face are the most lethal entities the Federation has found to date. Choose your agent and use their abilities to support your team or go on the offensive and shred through the enemy lines!
3110710.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
